headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:5000 https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://api.groq.com https://*.railway.app;
